aboutAttributionsIntro: Arborito bundles the following third-party assets offline (no CDN at runtime):
aboutAttributionsNoble: Cryptography (curves, hashes, ciphers, base encodings) © Paul Miller.
aboutAttributionsNoto: Emoji glyph fallback font © Google LLC, used unmodified.
aboutAttributionsHtml2pdf: In-browser PDF export (html2pdf.js) © Erik Koopmans, bundled offline.
aboutAttributionsJspdf: PDF generation (jsPDF) © James Hall, bundled offline.
aboutAttributionsTailwind: Utility CSS compiled into the bundled stylesheet.
aboutAttributionsTwemoji: Emoji graphics © Twitter, Inc. and contributors, used unmodified.
aboutAttributionsWebtorrent: Peer-to-peer transfer © WebTorrent LLC and contributors.
dsaContactBody: Single point of contact under Articles 11 and 12 of Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (Digital Services Act), for Member State authorities, the Commission, the Board, and recipients of the service alike: the operator e-mail address listed in the Impressum above. Communication is accepted in English, German, and Spanish.
dsaModerationBody: Content moderation policy (DSA Art. 14): Arborito is a local-first client for a decentralized network (Nostr relays operated by third parties). Treesys does not review each community tree and does not host the content. Restrictions apply only to the in-app Discover index (a consultative listing over relays you chose): (1) every network action must carry valid proof-of-work; events without it are ignored; (2) community report score scales with votes and recent usage, popular courses need more verified unique reporters; reporters are capped at 3 community reports per week and new accounts count at half weight; (3) owners see score/threshold in Forest and can publish a signed directory appeal that resets scoring; (4) a legal notice opens a dispute: ~48 h grace with deprioritized listing, then hidden without owner response; two independent legal notices can hide immediately; (5) each build may ship a maintainer blocklist; (6) tree owners moderate their own forums. No decision deletes content from third-party relays.
dsaNoticeBody: Notice and action (DSA Art. 16): to notify allegedly illegal content, open the tree's row in the public directory → Report → "Copyright" or "Illegal content". The form collects exact location, work identification or legal ground, substantiated explanation, optional evidence, your name and e-mail (empty only for CSAM notices), and a good-faith declaration. Your signed notice on the network is your receipt (Art. 16(4)). The author has about 48 hours for a signed response before the in-app index hides the entry; direct links still work. Statements of reasons (Art. 17) are shown in-app to affected publishers.
impressumIntro: The block below is the mandatory German legal notice (Impressum) for the Treesys operator, as required by Germany's Digital Services Act (DDG, § 5) and the Interstate Media Treaty (MStV, § 18), and it names the single point of contact under Articles 11 and 12 of the EU Digital Services Act (Regulation (EU) 2022/2065). For legal reasons it is published in German.
impressumText:
Arborito™ is a product of Treesys®.

Liability Disclaimer: The software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind, express or implied. Treesys is not an accredited educational institution and does not confer academic degrees. Certificates generated by this software are for gamification and self-tracking purposes only.

External Links: We accept no liability for the content of external links (e.g., third-party knowledge trees). The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
supportContributionsBody: Voluntary contributions to Arborito development are processed by Stripe Payments Europe Ltd. They are not a purchase of goods or a contract for services: they do not unlock in-app perks or additional rights. Recurring contributions can be cancelled at any time via the link in your Stripe receipt or Stripe’s customer portal. Under § 19 UStG (Kleinunternehmerregelung), no VAT (Umsatzsteuer) is charged.
legalOwnerDefenseConfirmBody: Your signed response is published to third-party Nostr relays alongside the timestamp of the latest legal report. If a competent authority requires it by law, those operators may share minimal metadata; Arborito does not intermediate such requests. Continue?
legalOwnerDefenseSuccessWithCase: Owner response published. Use case reference {caseId} in any e-mail thread with the claimant.
legalReportCaseIdHint: A unique case reference (e.g. ARB-20260706-A1B2C3) will be assigned to this notice. Quote it in e-mail with the tree owner; their signed response uses the same reference on the network.
legalReportSentWithCase: Legal notice stored on the network. Your case reference is {caseId}, keep it for e-mail threads and receipts (DSA Art. 16(4)). Arborito does not relay messages between parties.
legalReportDeclarationBody: I declare, in good faith, that the information and allegations contained in this notice are accurate and complete (EU Digital Services Act, Art. 16(2)(d)).
legalReportDescBody: Explain how this tree copies or closely imitates that work (min 200 characters).
legalReportGroundBody: Why is this content illegal? Name the law or legal ground you rely on (e.g. defamation, incitement, fraud, privacy violation) and the country whose law applies.
legalReportGroundPlaceholder: Law / legal ground and applicable country…
legalReportGroundTooShort: Please explain the legal ground more clearly (at least {n} characters).
legalReportLinksBody: Optional evidence links (one per line): official page, catalog, screenshot host, etc.
legalReportNotifierEmailBody: Your e-mail address, so the parties involved can follow up on this notice. Required by the EU Digital Services Act (Art. 16(2)(c)); it may be left empty only when the notice concerns material related to child sexual abuse.
legalReportNotifierNameBody: Your name, or the name of the entity you represent. Required by the EU Digital Services Act (Art. 16(2)(c)); it may be left empty only when the notice concerns material related to child sexual abuse. Anonymous notices may not qualify as valid DSA notices and carry less weight.
legalReportSent: Signed legal notice stored on the network. The timestamped, signed record IS your confirmation of receipt (DSA Art. 16(4)), keep the date for your records. Arborito does not relay messages between claimant and owner. Proof of settlement or withdrawal is handled outside the app (lawyer, court, or, if added later, a signed “withdraw” on the network). The distributor is not auto-notified and does not certify outcomes: use their contact only for app abuse or blocklist policy, not to mediate disputes. This is not legal advice: for formal action, consult a lawyer.
legalReportWhatWorkBody: Which work is being used without permission? Give title, author or rights holder, and a public link if one exists (store page, ISBN page, etc.).
legalReportWhatWorkPlaceholder: Title, creator, link to the original listing…
legalReportWhatWorkTooShort: Please identify the work more clearly (at least {n} characters).
legalReportWhereInTreeBody: Where in this tree is the infringing material? Be specific: paths, lesson or deck titles, on-screen text, or node ids. Vague one-line reports are not useful.
legalReportWhereInTreePlaceholder: e.g. Module "Basics" → lesson "…", the first card shows …
legalReportWhereTooShort: Please describe the location inside this tree more precisely (at least {n} characters).
discoverIndexPolicyBody: Discover index: an a posteriori moderated consultative listing over the relays you chose. Arborito does not validate every entry in advance and is not the content editor. When notified, we may exclude from the in-app index entries that are out of scope, carry false metadata, are illegal under applicable German law, or breach the Terms. Content may remain on the network; it is only hidden from this listing. You may operate your own index by forking the client (AGPL).
